SRS Document

Second Semester, Academic Year 2025–2026

**HabitHero**

**ALBERT JHUN CANEDO**

**JOHN MARK PAJA**

**STEPHEN PUSTA**

**CHRISTIAN VILLE RANQUE**

**ARLENE ROLLORATA**

**JOSHUA SERRANO**

**MARL LAURENCE SORIANO**

# **1\. Introduction**

## **1.1 Purpose**

This Software Requirements Specification (SRS) describes the functional and non-functional requirements of the **HabitHero mobile application**. The purpose of this document is to clearly define the system features, behavior, and constraints of the application for developers, testers, and stakeholders.

HabitHero is a mobile application designed to help users build and maintain positive habits. The application allows users to create habits, log daily habit activities, track their progress, and monitor their improvement over time. It also tracks habit streaks, which measure the number of consecutive days a habit has been completed. In addition, the system provides motivational quotes retrieved from an external API to encourage users to stay consistent with their habits.

The system aims to motivate users through simple tracking, streak monitoring, and an organized dashboard that displays their habit activities and daily progress.

This document serves as a reference for the development team during implementation and testing.

## **1.2 Scope**

HabitHero is a **habit tracking mobile application** developed using the **Flutter framework with Dart programming language**. The application enables users to manage their daily habits and monitor their progress.

The system will allow users to:

* Create and manage habits

* Track daily progress

* View habits on a dashboard

* Set targets for habit completion

* View habit details

* Manage their user profile

* Store data locally using SQLite

* View motivational quotes

* View streak habits

The system will **not include**:

* Online accounts or cloud synchronization

* Social sharing features

* Multi-user login authentication

HabitHero will function as a **standalone mobile application** designed primarily for Android devices.

## **1.3 Definitions and Acronyms**

| Term | Definition |
| ----- | ----- |
| CRUD | Create, Read, Update, Delete |
| SQLite | Lightweight embedded relational database |
| Flutter | UI toolkit for building natively compiled mobile applications |
| Dart | Programming language used by Flutter |

# **2\. Overall Description**

## **2.1 Product Perspective**

HabitHero is a **standalone mobile application** designed to help users develop positive habits and monitor their daily activities.

The application runs locally on a mobile device and stores data using an **SQLite database**. It does not depend on any external servers or cloud-based systems.

The system architecture includes:

* Flutter UI interface

* Controllers for managing application logic

* SQLite database for persistent data storage

* Model classes for representing habit and user data

## **2.2 User Characteristics**

The primary users of HabitHero are:

**Students**

* Want to track study habits or daily routines

* Basic knowledge of smartphone applications

**Young professionals**

* Want to improve productivity and lifestyle habits

User technical level:

* Beginner to intermediate smartphone users

* No technical knowledge required

Users expect the application to be:

* Simple and easy to use

* Fast and responsive

* Visually organized

2.3 Constraints

* Must use Flutter framework with Dart language  
* Must use SQLite for local data persistence  
* Must run on Android (iOS optional)  
* The application must follow **Material Design UI guidelines**  
* The application must work offline without internet connection  
* Development must follow the **course laboratory requirements**

# **3\. Functional Requirements**

List all features the app must provide. Use unique IDs for traceability.

| ID | Requirement | Priority | Assigned To |
| ----- | ----- | ----- | ----- |
| FR-001 | The app shall allow users to hero profile name | Must Have | MARL LAURENCE SORIANO |
| FR-002 | The app shall display the list of habits on the dashboard | Must Have | JOSHUA SERRANO |
| FR-003 | The app shall allow users to create new habits | Must Have | MARL LAURENCE SORIANO |
| FR-004 | The app shall allow users to edit existing habits | Must Have | JOSHUA SERRANO |
| FR-005 | The app shall allow users to delete habits | Must Have | JOSHUA SERRANO |
| FR-006 | The app shall persist data using SQLite database | Must Have | SENIOR DEV |
| FR-007 | The app shall provide search functionality | Should Have | MARL LAURENCE SORIANO |
| FR-008 | The app shall allow users to set targets or goals for each habit | Should Have | JOHN MARK PAJA |
| FR-009 | The app shall allow users to track habit streaks | Should Have | JOSHUA SERRANO |
| FR-010 | The app shall retrieve motivational quotes using an API | Should Have | JOSHUA SERRANO |
| FR-011 | The app shall allow users to view their profile information | Nice to Have | JOHN MARK PAJA |
| FR-012 | The app shall provide navigation between dashboard, profile, and habit screens | Nice to Have | JOHN MARK PAJA |

# **4\. Non-Functional Requirements**

| ID | Category | Requirement |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| NFR-001 | Performance | The app shall load the main screen within 2 seconds |
| NFR-002 | Usability | The app shall follow Material Design guidelines |
| NFR-003 | Reliability | The app shall handle errors gracefully without crashing |
| NFR-004 | Compatibility | The app shall run on Android 8.0 (API 26\) and above |
| NFR-005 | Maintainability | The application code shall follow modular Flutter architecture |
| NFR-006 | Security | User data shall be stored locally and protected from unauthorized access |

# **5\. Use Case Diagram**

The Use Case Diagram illustrates the interaction between the **user** and the **HabitHero Mobile Application**. It provides a high-level view of the system’s functionality and shows the main actions that users can perform within the application. In HabitHero, the user acts as the primary actor who interacts with the system to manage personal habits and monitor daily progress. The system allows the user to create, edit, and delete habits, record daily habit completion, and track habit streaks to measure consistency over time. Users can also view their habit dashboard to see an overview of their habits and progress. Additionally, the application integrates a **Motivational Quotes API**, which provides inspirational messages to encourage users to maintain their habits and stay motivated. 

| USE CASE DIAGRAM  |
| ----- |
| **Actor User** **Main Use Cases** Set Hero Profile Create Habit Edit Habit Delete Habit View Dashboard View Habit Log Daily Habit View Habit Streak Get Motivational Quote (API) **Figure 1\. Use Case Diagram of HabitHero Mobile Application** ![][image1] |
